mapper.sql: a.business_type AS businessType, a.business_id AS businessId, a.signature, a.is_verify_sign AS isVerifySign, a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_assist_signature a WHERE a.business_id IN #{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_assist_signature(business_type, business_id, signature, is_verify_sign, create_date, update_date) VALUES (#{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{signature}, #{isVerifySign}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_assist_signature WHERE business_type = #{businessType} AND business_id = #{businessId}
